CHATWOOT_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of your Chatwoot instance (e.g. https://chat.example.com). Use https://app.chatwoot.com for Chatwoot Cloud.

CHATWOOT_API_TOKEN.description: API access token for an agent/administrator (Profile → Access Tokens).

CHATWOOT_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Numeric account ID (visible in the URL after /app/accounts/).

MCP_AUTH_TOKEN.description: Bearer token that MCP clients (e.g. Claude Code) will send. Generate a strong random value.
